benchmark_metadata.candidate_technical_claim: On this fixed smoke benchmark, a deterministic evidence gate reduces silent pass-through of unsupported, policy-violating, and unsafe agent outputs versus simple local baselines while preserving replayable audit evidence.

required_difficulty_classes: D1 obvious violation with clean evidence
D3 partially true answer with unsupported addition
D4 noisy evidence or weak citation support
D8 agentic tool misuse or invalid action plan
D9 conflicting policies or unclear precedence

benchmark_metadata.statistical_interpretation: descriptive only; no statistical significance claim

scalability_profile.recommended_live_scale: repeat with frozen model/provider versions and stored outputs
scalability_profile.recommended_research_scale: 500+ fixed outputs across LLM and agent surfaces
scalability_profile.scenario_extension_model: append scenario objects to JSON dataset

useful_for: measuring unsupported-output pass rate on fixed outputs
checking replay stability of audit evidence
